overview: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology (TIET), formerly known as Thapar University, is a premier private deemed-to-be university located in Patiala, Punjab. Known for its strong industry-oriented curriculum, modern infrastructure, research culture, and excellent placement records, TIET is among the top-ranked private engineering institutions in India.
accreditation: NAAC A++ Accredited; ISO Certified for quality management systems in education.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹2,97,500 per semester. One-time admission fee: ₹23,000. Hostel: ₹34,600 – ₹77,000 per semester. Mess charges: ₹20,000 – ₹25,000 per semester.
₹2,70,000 per semester. One-time admission fee: ₹23,000. Hostel and mess charges additional.
₹2,27,500 per semester. One-time admission fee: ₹23,000. Hostel and mess charges additional.
₹89,500 – ₹99,700 per semester. GATE-qualified students eligible for AICTE stipend.

admissions.admissionProcess: B.E. admissions are primarily based on JEE Main scores and centralized counseling. M.Tech admissions are based on GATE scores and institute criteria.
admissions.importantDates: Admissions generally follow JoSAA counseling schedules and TIET academic admission timelines.

campus.specialNote: Hostel charges vary depending on room type (AC/Non-AC, single/shared occupancy). Merit scholarships based on JEE Main ranks and 10+2 PCM scores are available.

scholarships.meritScholarships: Up to 100% tuition fee waiver based on JEE Main rank performance.
scholarships.pcmScholarships: Students scoring above 80% in PCM may receive 20% – 30% tuition fee waiver.
scholarships.gateStipend: AICTE stipend of ₹12,400 per month for eligible M.Tech students with valid GATE scores.

contact.address: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology, Patiala – 147004, Punjab, India
